steps.title: Translate the model to an equation
steps.content: The statement "head width equals 0.8 added to five times body weight" becomes: $$h = 0.8 + 5w$$ where $h$ is head width in mm and $w$ is body weight in grams.

steps.title: Substitute the body weight and compute
steps.content: With $w=0.4$ grams, substitute directly: $$h=0.8+5(0.4)=0.8+2=2.8$$ The head width is 2.8 millimeters, so valid entries include 2.8 and 14/5.
